trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Shrek 5 | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
It’s happening... it’s really happening!  Experience Shrek 5 only in theaters summer 2027.
______
 
Next summer, DreamWorks Animation invites audiences on a thrilling, magical new comedy adventure from one of the most beloved global animated franchises of all time: Shrek 5.
 
Comedy legends Mike Myers, Oscar® nominee Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz return to their signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Emmy winning superstar Zendaya (The Odyssey, Dune franchise) joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) and Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle.  
 
Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award® nominated Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of

trending_videos.title: Street Fighter 6 - Yasmine Gameplay Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Hailing from the Philippines, Yasmine will rush you down with her skills in Eskrima on August 3!

Pay close attention to her movement lest you be on the wrong side of her karambit.

Yasmine can be purchased individually with Fighter Coins and the owners of the Year 4 Character Pass / Ultimate Pass will automatically get access to her when she releases.

trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER 2 REACTION!! Angry Hulk Is Back!
trending_videos.description:
FIRST LOOK AT GRAY HULK?! Spider-Man Brand New Day New Trailer Reaction. SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER 2 REACTION — We're watching the new Brand New Day trailer for the first time and we are NOT okay. Gray Hulk, Scorpion, Punisher, and is Sadie Sink playing Jean Grey?! Peter's mutation, the "bye someone" moment, Aunt May's voiceover — this trailer destroyed us.We react to every major moment: Peter's black eyes and organic webbing mutation, Bruce Banner warning "if you see me with this off, RUN," Punisher not recognizing Peter at all ("who the hell are you?!"), Spider-Man vs. Scorpion, The Hand ninjas, and the unseen villain that only Peter can sense. MJ swinging alongside Spider-Man at the end hit different too.Spider-Man: Brand New Day hits theaters July 31, 2026 — and after this trailer, we cannot wait. 
#Spiderman #SpidermanBrandNewDay #TomHolland #Zendaya #Hulk #Marvel #MCU #marvelentertainment #BrandNewDay #MarvelStudios #SadieSink #JeanGrey #Reaction #TrailerReaction  

Follo
tags: spider-man brand new day trailer reaction
spider man brand new day trailer

keyObservations.description: The Spider-Man franchise appears in titles multiple times, indicating high audience interest. This includes trailers, breakdowns, and reactions.
keyObservations.opportunity: Content creators can capitalize on upcoming Spider-Man releases or related superhero content to leverage this interest.

keyObservations.description: Gaming challenges and playthroughs are featured prominently, showcasing a strong audience engagement in interactive and entertaining video game content.
keyObservations.opportunity: Develop unique gaming challenges or collaborate with popular streamers to increase engagement.

keyObservations.description: Film trailers, such as for 'Shrek 5' and 'Spider-Man', are drawing significant attention, suggesting a continued appetite for new film releases.
keyObservations.opportunity: Create content that predicts or analyzes upcoming film releases to capture an interested audience.

topChannels.description: Sony's official content tends to trend, especially with high-profile releases like Spider-Man.
This channel’s inclusion in trending videos suggests a niche or unique content style appealing to audiences.
Known for breakdowns and detailed analysis, indicating a market for in-depth content.

insights: Collaboration with top channels or influencers who have a history of trending content can boost visibility.
Diversifying content to include both entertainment and educational elements (such as breakdowns and reactions) may enhance viewer engagement.

strategicRecommendations.rationale: Given the popularity of gaming and interactive content, developing innovative formats like live challenges or interactive storytelling can attract a larger audience.
Engage audiences with predictions, analysis, and discussions surrounding anticipated film releases to capitalize on existing trends.

strategicRecommendations.action: Focus on Superhero and Fantasy Genres
strategicRecommendations.rationale: With consistent interest in superhero and fantasy themes, producing related content could engage a dedicated fanbase.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
